{{CargoRelic
|name=Tetromino
|rank=S
|affct=FAME
|birthday=10-28
|source=FAME Master Scrolls (31.5%), Fragment Crafting (20.7%), Lottery Machine (0.81%), Master Scrolls (6.5%), Relic Forge (90 Relic RF), Wishing (0.75%)
|description=On Oct 28, 1984, Alexey Pajitnov invented a famous puzzle game using tetrominoes.

In 1953, Mathematician Solomon W. Golomb created the word "tetromino," a geometric shape composed of four squares connected orthogonally. It has been used in many video games, the most renowned one was developed by a Russian programmer to test the capabilities of computers at the time. According to research, playing that game can help reduce cravings for junk food and smoking.
|fame=97
|art=61
|fth=57
|civ=68
|tech=49
|ss1=Snail HP +100<br>Per Minigame installed, Snail HP +10<br>Per Minigame installed, Snail ATK +1<br>Minigames Installed: 20/20
|ss2=Snail HP +200<br>Per Minigame installed, Snail HP +20<br>Per Minigame installed, Snail ATK +2<br>Minigames Installed: 20/20
|ss3=Snail HP +300<br>Per Minigame installed, Snail HP +30<br>Per Minigame installed, Snail ATK +3<br>Minigames Installed: 20/20
|ss4=Snail HP +500<br>Per Minigame installed, Snail HP +50<br>Per Minigame installed, Snail ATK +5<br>Minigames Installed: 20/20
|ss5=Snail HP +700<br>Per Minigame installed, Snail HP +70<br>Per Minigame installed, Snail ATK +7<br>Minigames Installed: 20/20
|ss6=Snail HP +1,000<br>Per Minigame installed, Snail HP +100<br>Per Minigame installed, Snail ATK +10<br>Minigames Installed: 20/20
|ss7=Snail HP +1,000<br>Per Minigame installed, Snail HP +100<br>Per Minigame installed, Snail ATK +10<br>Minigames Installed: 20/20<br>Snail HP +1,000 (Awakened)
|skill1=[[File:Lumbercamp skill III.png|50px]]Place in Lumber Camp: Wood Output +30%
|skill2=[[File:Quarry skill III.png|50px]]Place in Quarry: This Relic's FAME +15
|skill3=[[File:Tadpolepond skill III.png|50px]]Place in Tadpole Pond: This Relic's FAME +15
|mirage={{Mirage|name=Fun of Clearing|reward=[[Minigames|Explosive Cube Minigame]]
|3name=Red Polycube|3rec=113k|3atk=2706|3def=1659|3hp=8867|3weak=2284
|6name=Blue Polycube|6rec=618k|6atk=16327|6def=10739|6hp=104375|6weak=6838
|Arec=2.58M|Aatk=45556|Adef=29963|Ahp=699428|Aweak=12417
}}
}}

[[Category:HP Boost]]
[[Category:ATK Boost]]
[[Category:Minigame Boost]]
[[Category:Lumber Camp Skill]]
[[Category:Lumber Camp Output Boost]]
[[Category:Quarry Skill]]
[[Category:FAME Boost]]
[[Category:Tadpole Pond Skill]]
[[Category:Lottery Machine Boost]]
[[Category:INTEL Boost]]
[[Category:Enhanced by Lottery Draws]]
[[Category:Rewards Minigame]]
[[Category:Keyboard Warrior Boost]]
